recommendations.title: Now, Voyager
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a nervous breakdown and an oppressive mother before being freed by the love of a man she meets on a cruise.

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: Wakefield
recommendations.overview: A man's nervous breakdown causes him to leave his wife and live in his attic for several months.

recommendations.title: ¿Y Cómo Es Él?
recommendations.overview: Thomas is a meek man on the verge of a nervous breakdown. Despite his situation he decides to fake a work trip to go to Vallarta to confront Jero, a taxi driver who is sleeping with his wife.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth 2
recommendations.overview: With college decisions looming, Elle juggles her long-distance romance with Noah, changing relationship with bestie Lee and feelings for a new classmate.

recommendations.title: The Graduate
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.
